title: Slovakian Mushroom Pasta Bake
description: A hearty german-inspired pasta bake featuring mushrooms from the slovakian region. This recipe is perfect for a cold winter night.
instructions: Cook the glassy pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the slovakian mushroom sauce over medium heat.
Add the sliced mushrooms to the skillet and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Combine the cooked pasta and mushroom mixture in a large bowl.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a baking dish.
Top with additional slovakian mushroom sauce if desired.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned.
